requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — Tajikstandart Conformity Certification and IEC 62619 as Baseline for Tajikistan BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——Tajikstandart合格认证及IEC 62619作为塔吉克斯坦BESS项目验收基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——Tajikstandart合格認證及IEC 62619作為塔吉克斯坦BESS項目驗收基準

summary.en: The Tajikistan Committee on Standards, Metrology and Trade (Tajikstandart) under the Ministry of Economic Development and Trade of the Republic of Tajikistan is the national standards and conformity assessment authority. Tajikstandart issues Tajikistan certificates of conformity (Сертификат соответствия) for products on the mandatory certification list, adopting or adapting IEC and GOST standards. CRITICAL NOTE: Tajikistan is NOT a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU). It holds observer/candidate status only. EAC marks (Eurasian Conformity) and TR CU Technical Regulations — used in Armenia, Belarus, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, and Russia — do NOT by themselves constitute market access authorisation in Tajikistan. A product with an EAC mark still requires separate Tajikstandart conformity assessment before it can be legally sold or installed in Tajikistan. No confirmed mandatory Tajikstandart Technical Regulation (TR TJ) specifically for stationary lithium BESS products has been identified from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. In practice, donor-funded BESS projects (World Bank, ADB, EBRD) in Tajikistan require IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) as the cell and module safety baseline in technical specifications, and IEC 62133 where consumer-grade cells are in scope. Tajikstandart conformity certification plus IEC 62619 evidence is the practical dual gate for BESS market access in Tajikistan.
summary.zh: 塔吉克斯坦共和国经济发展和贸易部下属标准、计量和贸易委员会（Tajikstandart）是国家标准和合格评定主管机关。Tajikstandart为强制认证清单上的产品颁发塔吉克斯坦合格证书（Сертификат соответствия），采纳或改编IEC和GOST标准。重要提示：塔吉克斯坦非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，仅持有观察员/候选国身份。亚美尼亚、白俄罗斯、哈萨克斯坦、吉尔吉斯斯坦和俄罗斯使用的EAC标志（欧亚合格认证）和TR CU技术法规，本身不构成在塔吉克斯坦的市场准入授权。持有EAC标志的产品在塔吉克斯坦合法销售或安装前，仍须单独进行Tajikstandart合格评定。截至本数据集日期，尚未从可公开获取的官方来源发现专门针对固定式锂BESS产品的已确认强制性Tajikstandart技术法规（TR TJ）。实践中，塔吉克斯坦捐助方资助的BESS项目（世界银行、亚行、欧洲复兴开发银行）在技术规格中要求以IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）作为电芯和模组安全基准，消费级电芯适用范围内还引用IEC 62133。Tajikstandart合格认证加IEC 62619证据是塔吉克斯坦BESS市场准入的实际双重门槛。
summary.zht: 塔吉克斯坦共和國經濟發展和貿易部下屬標準、計量和貿易委員會（Tajikstandart）是國家標準和合格評定主管機關。Tajikstandart為強制認證清單上的產品頒發塔吉克斯坦合格證書（Сертификат соответствия），採納或改編IEC和GOST標準。重要提示：塔吉克斯坦非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，僅持有觀察員/候選國身份。亞美尼亞、白俄羅斯、哈薩克斯坦、吉爾吉斯斯坦和俄羅斯使用的EAC標誌（歐亞合格認證）和TR CU技術法規，本身不構成在塔吉克斯坦的市場准入授權。持有EAC標誌的產品在塔吉克斯坦合法銷售或安裝前，仍須單獨進行Tajikstandart合格評定。截至本數據集日期，尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源發現專門針對固定式鋰BESS產品的已確認強制性Tajikstandart技術法規（TR TJ）。實踐中，塔吉克斯坦捐助方資助的BESS項目（世界銀行、亞行、歐洲復興開發銀行）在技術規格中要求以IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）作為電芯和模組安全基準，消費級電芯適用範圍內還引用IEC 62133。Tajikstandart合格認證加IEC 62619證據是塔吉克斯坦BESS市場准入的實際雙重門檻。

standards_or_laws: Tajikstandart (Committee on Standards, Metrology and Trade of the Republic of Tajikistan) — national conformity certification authority; issues Сертификат соответствия for products on mandatory certification list

IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; referenced in donor-funded project specifications in Tajikistan)
IEC 62133-2:2017 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (may apply where consumer-format cells are in scope)
GOST IEC 62619 — Tajikstandart-adopted version of IEC 62619 (adoption status requires direct verification with Tajikstandart as of dataset date)
NOTE: EAC marks and TR CU Technical Regulations (EAEU) do NOT constitute Tajikistan market access — Tajikstandart conformity is required separately

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), replacing the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Tajikstandart conformity assessment or donor-funded project specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory and apply for Tajikstandart conformity certification separately from Chinese GB compliance. An EAC certificate (even where held from a neighbouring EAEU market) does not remove the Tajikstandart conformity obligation.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被Tajikstandart合格评定或捐助方资助项目规格接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书，并独立于中国GB合规申请Tajikstandart合格认证。即使持有相邻EAEU市场的EAC证书，也不免除Tajikstandart合格认证义务。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被Tajikstandart合格評定或捐助方資助項目規格接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書，並獨立於中國GB合規申請Tajikstandart合格認證。即使持有相鄰EAEU市場的EAC證書，也不免除Tajikstandart合格認證義務。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gaps: (1) EAEU/EAC route does NOT apply — Tajikistan is not an EAEU member; EAC marks and TR CU certificates do not grant market access in Tajikistan; Tajikstandart conformity certification is required independently; (2) IEC 62619 evidence is the internationally expected cell and module safety baseline for donor-funded BESS projects in Tajikistan; Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not accepted as substitutes; obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (3) verify with Tajikstandart whether stationary BESS cells or systems are on the mandatory certification product list (Перечень продукции) and the applicable conformity assessment procedure before shipment; (4) high-altitude cold-climate derating — IEC 62619 type-test conditions are typically at standard atmospheric pressure and temperature; Tajikistan sites above 2,000 m and at temperatures below −20 °C require supplemental design and test evidence for cell performance and BMS behaviour at altitude and low temperature; (5) confirm whether Tajikstandart has formally adopted GOST IEC 62619 and whether that adopted version is accepted as the conformity basis.
gap.zh: 关键差距：（1）EAEU/EAC路径不适用——塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成员；EAC标志和TR CU证书不授予塔吉克斯坦市场准入；须独立申请Tajikstandart合格认证；（2）IEC 62619证据是塔吉克斯坦捐助方资助BESS项目的国际预期电芯和模组安全基准；中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被接受为替代依据；须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书；（3）出货前向Tajikstandart核实固定式BESS电芯或系统是否列入强制认证产品目录（Перечень продукции）及适用的合格评定程序；（4）高海拔寒冷气候降额——IEC 62619型式试验条件通常为标准大气压和温度；塔吉克斯坦2,000米以上且气温低于−20°C的场址，须补充电芯性能和BMS高海拔低温行为的设计和测试证据；（5）确认Tajikstandart是否已正式采纳GOST IEC 62619，以及该采纳版本是否被接受为合格认证依据。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：（1）EAEU/EAC路徑不適用——塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成員；EAC標誌和TR CU證書不授予塔吉克斯坦市場准入；須獨立申請Tajikstandart合格認證；（2）IEC 62619證據是塔吉克斯坦捐助方資助BESS項目的國際預期電芯和模組安全基準；中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被接受為替代依據；須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（3）出貨前向Tajikstandart核實固定式BESS電芯或系統是否列入強制認證產品目錄（Перечень продукции）及適用的合格評定程序；（4）高海拔寒冷氣候降額——IEC 62619型式試驗條件通常為標準大氣壓和溫度；塔吉克斯坦2,000米以上且氣溫低於−20°C的場址，須補充電芯性能和BMS高海拔低溫行為的設計和測試證據；（5）確認Tajikstandart是否已正式採納GOST IEC 62619，以及該採納版本是否被接受為合格認證依據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where donor/lender (World Bank, ADB) or Barqi Tojik project specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; Tajikstandart mandatory certification obligation for BESS products requires direct verification with Tajikstandart — EAC/TR CU does NOT substitute for Tajikstandart conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; neither is accepted as equivalent to IEC 62619 or Tajikstandart conformity

source.publisher: Tajikstandart — Committee on Standards, Metrology and Trade of the Republic of Tajikistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Tajikistan is NOT an EAEU member — EAC marks and TR CU certificates do not constitute Tajikistan market access. The applicable route is Tajikstandart conformity certification. No confirmed mandatory Tajikstandart Technical Regulation for stationary BESS has been identified as of the dataset date; verify the mandatory certification product list directly with Tajikstandart before shipment. IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is the internationally expected safety baseline for BESS cells and modules in donor-funded projects in Tajikistan. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 alone are not sufficient. High-altitude (above 2,000 m) and cold-climate (below −20 °C) conditions require supplemental design and test evidence beyond standard IEC 62619 type-test conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成员——EAC标志和TR CU证书不构成塔吉克斯坦市场准入。适用路径为Tajikstandart合格认证。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认专门针对固定式BESS的强制性Tajikstandart技术法规；出货前请直接向Tajikstandart核实强制认证产品目录。来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62619型式试验证据是塔吉克斯坦捐助方资助项目中BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全基准。仅凭中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不足以满足要求。高海拔（2,000米以上）和寒冷气候（低于−20°C）条件须在标准IEC 62619型式试验条件之外提供补充设计和测试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成員——EAC標誌和TR CU證書不構成塔吉克斯坦市場准入。適用路徑為Tajikstandart合格認證。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認專門針對固定式BESS的強制性Tajikstandart技術法規；出貨前請直接向Tajikstandart核實強制認證產品目錄。來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62619型式試驗證據是塔吉克斯坦捐助方資助項目中BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全基準。僅憑中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不足以滿足要求。高海拔（2,000米以上）和寒冷氣候（低於−20°C）條件須在標準IEC 62619型式試驗條件之外提供補充設計和測試證據。
